utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I know , I lied ! I did not want her to think I was a terrible mother ! I can not even see my own baby !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I lied ! I did not want her to think I was a terrible mother ! I can not even see my own baby !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh sure , come here ! Sure you can ! Uh , look come here look , it is ... it is ... it is , it is right there .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh . Oh , it is beautiful . I see it now .

emotion_cause.span: 3_it is beautiful . I see it now .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , I do not see it !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Come on ! Come on ! Here , okay ... okay , you see this ? This tiny thing that looks like a peanut ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: That is it ? Well I saw that ! Ohh ... ohh ... oh , thank you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wow ! I can not believe that is our baby .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I can not believe that is our baby .
